title: Maximum Product After K Increments
description:
You are given an array of non-negative integers nums and an integer k. In one operation, you may choose any element from nums and increment it by 1.

Return _the maximum product of_ nums _after at most_ k _operations._ Since the answer may be very large, return it modulo 109 + 7. Note that you should maximize the product before taking the modulo.
